title: DelegatePaymentRequest
description: Request to create a scoped one-time delegated payment token. The token is bound to a specific checkout session and merchant — it cannot be used to charge more than max_amount, cannot be reused, and expires at expires_at.

type.description: Payment method type. UPI variants are India-specific extensions to base ACP.

vpa.description: Virtual Payment Address — required for upi_collect (e.g. raj@upi).

card_number.description: Card number (FPAN or network token) — required for type=card.

allowance.description: Usage constraints. The PSP MUST reject any charge that violates these constraints.

reason.description: The token may only be charged once. Currently only 'one_time' is defined.

max_amount.description: Maximum chargeable amount in paise (INR minor units). The PSP MUST reject any charge exceeding this value.

currency.description: Currency code (ISO 4217 lowercase). Must be 'inr' for the India profile.

checkout_session_id.description: The checkout session this token is bound to. The PSP SHOULD reject redemption if the session ID does not match.

merchant_id.description: The merchant this token is bound to. Prevents replay across merchants.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp. The PSP MUST reject redemption after this time.

risk_signals.description: Fraud/risk signals collected by the agent. At least one required.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata. Values must be strings, numbers, or booleans.
